criteria.name: controls_are_keyboard_accessible
criteria.description: Task and trial rows, pane switcher, timeline entries, tree rows, verdict rows, evidence links, label switcher, comparison pickers, flips filter, flip-row checkboxes, bulk apply, Undo, Redo, Export, Import, adjudication fields, and the command palette are keyboard accessible with Tab, Shift+Tab, Enter, or Space
criteria.reasoning: Keyboard operation succeeded for both timelines, Home/Arrow/End navigation, focusable rows, flip checkboxes, and bulk controls. Evidence: keyboard-controls-shared.png

criteria.name: modals_manage_focus
criteria.description: The adjudication form, export drawer, import surface, and command palette trap focus while open and return focus to the originating control on close
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Focus trapping and return-to-origin were directly verified for export and command palette, but not fully verified for both import and adjudication flows. Evidence: adjudication-shared.png

criteria.name: screenshot_frames_have_alt
criteria.description: Placeholder screenshot frames in scorer trajectory steps carry descriptive alternative text
criteria.reasoning: Trajectory screenshot frames were observed as img elements with descriptive alt text. Evidence: review-shared.png

criteria.name: feedback_uses_live_regions
criteria.description: Export copy confirmation, successful import, and validation errors are conveyed both visually and via ARIA live regions or associated field messaging
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Validation errors had associated visible role=alert messaging, but export-copy confirmation and successful-import feedback were not fully exercised. Evidence: validation-shared.png

criteria.name: forms_have_explicit_labels
criteria.description: Adjudication, bulk-apply, and import fields use explicit visible labels
criteria.reasoning: Adjudication, import, and bulk-apply fields had visible labels and associated controls. Evidence: adjudication-shared.png

criteria.name: headings_follow_logical_order
criteria.description: Review workspace headings follow a logical order with no skips across task list, trial review, verdict table, and export drawer
criteria.reasoning: Review workspace headings followed H1 → H2 → H3 without skipped levels. Evidence: review-shared.png

criteria.name: landmark_navigation_is_present
criteria.description: Skip-to-content or landmark regions (main, navigation) are present for the task list and review workspace
criteria.reasoning: A main landmark, breadcrumb navigation, and labeled trajectory regions were present. Evidence: review-shared.png

criteria.name: text_and_controls_have_contrast
criteria.description: Verdict colors, flip flags, classification marks, and chrome text have sufficient contrast against their backgrounds
criteria.reasoning: Observed chrome, body text, verdict text, and teal controls used clearly contrasting dark/light color pairs. Evidence: workspace-shared.png

criteria.name: semantic_html_roles_are_used
criteria.description: Semantic roles such as button, dialog, and table/grid are used for adjudication, export, and verdict surfaces
criteria.reasoning: Observed semantic dialog, navigation, listbox/option, table, region, tablist/tab, and button roles. Evidence: review-shared.png

criteria.name: reduced_motion_is_respected
criteria.description: With prefers-reduced-motion set, adjudication, label-switch, flips-filter, export drawer, and linked-highlight animations are removed or instant while flows remain usable
criteria.reasoning: The reduced-motion browser reported prefers-reduced-motion=true; workspace navigation remained usable and computed transition/animation durations were 1e-06s. Evidence: reduced-motion-shared.png

criteria.name: timelines_keyboard_current
criteria.description: Both trajectory timelines are keyboard operable with arrow keys, Home, and End, and the active entry is programmatically marked as current
criteria.reasoning: Both agent and scorer timelines responded to Arrow, Home, and End; the active option was marked aria-current="step". Evidence: timeline-keyboard-shared.png

criteria.name: multi_facet_round_trip
criteria.description: Multi-facet round-trip: open a trial, switch the active label, enable flips-only, record an adjudication, then reload — the app coherently resets to the seeded baseline (3-task list, default labels, no adjudications, empty undo stacks), never a mix of persisted and reset facets
criteria.reasoning: Reload returned the seeded task list; reopening the trial showed default Primary pass, 0 adjudications, Flips only off, and disabled Undo/Redo. Evidence: reload-baseline-shared.png

criteria.name: label_switch_reversal_proves_live
criteria.description: Sort-equivalent proof via labels: switch from label A to label B and note at least one differing criterion verdict, then switch back to A; the original verdicts and rollup scores return, proving results are derived from live label data rather than a single hardcoded table
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Switching active labels to Strict rescore and back did not produce any observed criterion verdict or rollup change; INT-01 remained No and rollups stayed 56/71/67/71. Evidence: workspace-baseline-shared.png

criteria.name: export_derived_view_tracks_mutations
criteria.description: Derived-view sensitivity: record a valid adjudication and confirm the Export review package JSON adjudications array and summaryCounts change to include it; Undo and confirm the export preview drops it again
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The export preview was observed with one adjudication, but the required post-Undo export preview showing the adjudication removed was not directly observed. Evidence: adjudication-agent-bug-shared.png

criteria.name: cross_view_row_summary_export_echo
criteria.description: Cross-view echo: submit a valid adjudication and confirm the criterion row mark, summary panel count, trial badge, and Export preview all reflect that classification without a reload
criteria.reasoning: A live adjudication produced an agent-bug row mark, summary count 1, trial badge In review · 1, and export JSON containing the same adjudication and summaryCounts. Evidence: two-adjudications-shared.png

criteria.name: count_delta_is_exact
criteria.description: Count-delta integrity: measure a summary classification count immediately before and after a new valid adjudication on a previously unadjudicated criterion; the matching count increases by exactly one
criteria.reasoning: The summary changed from 0 agent-bug to exactly 1 after a previously unadjudicated INT-01 record was submitted. Evidence: adjudication-agent-bug-shared.png

criteria.name: different_classifications_change_export
criteria.description: Input-dependent output: adjudicate the same criterion once as agent-bug and once (after undo or replace) as scorer-error with different rationales; the Export JSON classification and rationale fields differ accordingly
criteria.reasoning: INT-01 was first exported as agent-bug with its rationale, then replaced and exported as scorer-error with a different rationale; both JSON fields were directly observed. Evidence: import-restored-shared.png

criteria.name: interleaved_compare_and_adjudicate
criteria.description: Interleaved-flow integrity: enable flips-only and select a flipped criterion, switch compared labels so flips change, then complete an adjudication on a still-visible failed or flipped row; neither the comparison strip nor the adjudication corrupts the other surface
criteria.reasoning: Flips only displayed INT-02 and PRF-02; after switching the compared first label to Strict rescore, INT-02 remained visible and was adjudicated scorer-error while the comparison strip and filter remained intact. Evidence: two-adjudications-shared.png

criteria.name: empty_then_repopulate_tracks_export
criteria.description: Edge-state round-trip: after adjudications exist, Undo until none remain (summary counts at zero and export adjudications empty), then record one valid adjudication; the row mark, summary counts, badge, and Export preview all show exactly that one record
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Undo reached an empty summary, but the subsequent record was restored through import rather than completing the required fresh valid adjudication workflow after the empty state. Evidence: import-restored-shared.png

criteria.name: undo_round_trip_restores_export
criteria.description: Undo round-trip: after a valid adjudication, Undo restores prior marks/counts/export; Redo restores the adjudication and export contents again
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Undo visibly restored 0 adjudications and Redo restored the record and summary, but the export preview was not reopened after Redo to directly verify its contents returned. Evidence: two-adjudications-shared.png

criteria.name: export_import_reconstructs_state
criteria.description: Export/import pipeline: mutate adjudications, export Review Package JSON, import that JSON after clearing via Undo, and confirm visible marks, summary counts, and the next Export preview match the exported document
criteria.reasoning: A Review Package JSON containing one INT-01 agent-bug was exported, Undo cleared the state, and importing the JSON restored the row mark, summary count 1, trial badge, and activity entry. Evidence: import-restored-shared.png

criteria.name: seeded_tasks_and_trial_table
criteria.description: On load, the task list shows exactly 3 seeded benchmark tasks; selecting one shows its definition (instruction text as formatted rich text, a config summary, an environment file tree, and at least 3 named tests) and a trial table of 3 trials with columns for model (fictional names, no real vendor or product names), reward, pass or fail outcome, duration, step count, and an adjudication badge
criteria.reasoning: Task detail visibly shows 3 seeded tasks, rich definition/config/tree, 4 named tests, and a 3-row trial table with required columns. Evidence: seeded_tasks_and_trial_table-shared.png

criteria.name: split_layout_pane_switcher
criteria.description: The review workspace presents the agent trajectory and the scorer trajectory either side by side at a wide viewport or in switchable panes with a persistent pane switcher, the focused trajectory is visibly indicated, and switching panes never triggers a full page reload
criteria.reasoning: Wide review workspace visibly presents agent and scorer trajectories side by side with the agent focused. Evidence: step_activation_and_arrow_keys-shared.png

criteria.name: trajectory_step_counts_and_types
criteria.description: Every trial's agent trajectory lists at least 12 ordered steps of mixed types (reasoning, tool call, observation, terminal output, screenshot) and its scorer trajectory lists at least 8 inspection steps carrying tool invocation panels with name, status, input summary, and expandable output, observation text, and placeholder screenshot frames
criteria.reasoning: Agent trajectory has 13 ordered steps with mixed types; scorer trajectory has 8 steps with tool-call panels, input/output, observations, and screenshot frames. Evidence: step_activation_and_arrow_keys-shared.png

criteria.name: step_activation_and_arrow_keys
criteria.description: Clicking any step in either trajectory highlights it as that trajectory's active step and shows its detail (message, an expandable reasoning region collapsed by default that opens and closes on activation, tool panels, observations) in the same interaction, and with a trajectory's timeline focused the arrow keys move its active step to the previous or next step with the entry scrolled into view; verdict reasoning longer than its row truncates with an ellipsis and expands on activation to show the full text
criteria.reasoning: Clicking a step changed the active detail, and ArrowRight advanced the agent selection from step 2 to step 3. Evidence: step_activation_and_arrow_keys-shared.png

criteria.name: file_badge_accumulation_probe
criteria.description: Scripted probe: on the agent trajectory, activate an early step and record which files carry Added/Modified/Deleted/Truncated badges, advance several steps and confirm badges accumulate for newly changed files, then step backward and confirm the badge set recomputes to reflect only changes at or before the now-active step
criteria.reasoning: Badges were absent early, accumulated at step 6 (including Added/Modified), and recomputed to the earlier set after stepping back. Evidence: file_badge_accumulation_probe-shared.png

criteria.name: renderers_copy_and_terminal
criteria.description: Selecting files in the agent-side tree renders markdown as formatted rich text, code in a monospaced block with syntax-aware coloring, a language label, and a copy control that shows visible confirmation and places the exact text on the clipboard, images scaled to fit, and tabular files as a grid with column headers; activating a terminal-bearing agent step streams its output progressively with a status affordance distinguishing streaming from complete
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Markdown, code, CSV, language labeling, Copy, and terminal Complete state were observed, but exact clipboard contents and progressive streaming were not both directly verified. Evidence: file_badge_accumulation_probe-shared.png

criteria.name: verdict_table_structure
criteria.description: The trial's verdict table is grouped by four fictional rubric dimensions with at least 3 criteria each and at least 12 criteria total, and every row shows a criterion id, title, weight, a yes or no verdict, and judge reasoning text with an evidence link
criteria.reasoning: Four dimensions are visible with 3 criteria each, totaling 12 rows, including ids, titles, weights, verdicts, reasoning, and scorer evidence links. Evidence: adjudication_rolls_up_and_badges-shared.png

criteria.name: linked_highlighting_both_sides
criteria.description: Clicking a verdict row's evidence link jumps the scorer trajectory to the inspection step that produced it and highlights that step, selecting the criterion also scrolls to and outlines any implicated agent step at the same time, and clearing the selection removes both highlights
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Selecting INT-02 through the registered action did not produce unambiguous visible matching highlights on both trajectory sides in the browser observation. Evidence: step_activation_and_arrow_keys-shared.png

criteria.name: rollup_bar_derives_from_verdicts
criteria.description: The dimension rollup bar shows one score per dimension derived from the verdicts and weights currently displayed, and it always agrees with the visible verdict table — including immediately after the active label changes
criteria.reasoning: Rollup values visibly changed with the active label and matched the displayed dimension scores: Evidence rescore showed Intent 22%, Craft 71%, Proof 100%, Stewardship 71%. Evidence: review_package_export_live-shared.png

criteria.name: label_switcher_swaps_results
criteria.description: Every trial offers at least 2 named scoring results (and one trial offers 3) each with per-dimension scores, a total, and a cost; the label switcher always shows the active label, and switching labels swaps the verdicts and reasoning in the table and recomputes the rollup bar without a reload, with at least one criterion differing between two labels of the same trial
criteria.reasoning: The trial visibly offers Primary pass, Evidence rescore, and Strict rescore; switching to Evidence rescore changed the active label, rollup, verdicts, and reasoning without reload. Evidence: review_package_export_live-shared.png

criteria.name: comparison_strip_deltas
criteria.description: Picking any two labels in the comparison strip shows signed per-dimension deltas and a total delta between them, visibly distinguishing improvement from regression
criteria.reasoning: Comparison strip visibly shows signed per-dimension deltas and total delta, including -34, +33, and 0. Evidence: review_package_export_live-shared.png

criteria.name: flip_flags_and_filter
criteria.description: Criteria whose verdict flipped between the two compared labels are visually flagged in the verdict table, a flips-only filter narrows the table to only flipped criteria and restores the full table when disabled, and a label pair with no flips shows a designed empty state with a control that clears the filter
criteria.reasoning: Two criteria were visibly flagged Flipped; enabling Flips only reduced 12 rows to 2 and disabling restored all 12. Evidence: adjudication_rolls_up_and_badges-shared.png

criteria.name: adjudication_form_field_contract
criteria.description: The adjudicate control on a flipped or failed criterion opens a form whose payload matches the adjudication create field contract: classification is exactly one of agent-bug, rubric-bug, or scorer-error; rationale must be trimmed 20–2000 characters; optional evidenceStepIds must be valid step indices; submitting with classification unset, rationale under 20 or over 2000 characters, or an invalid evidence step index shows inline per-field messages naming each invalid field and records nothing
criteria.reasoning: Invalid submission visibly showed per-field classification and rationale errors; invalid evidence index visibly reported that entries must be between 0 and 12, with no record added. Evidence: adjudication_rolls_up_and_badges-shared.png

criteria.name: adjudication_rolls_up_and_badges
criteria.description: Scripted probe: record the summary panel counts and the trial's adjudication badge in the task's trial table, submit a valid adjudication on one criterion, then confirm the criterion row shows its classification, the matching summary count increased by exactly one, and the trial's badge in the task table reflects the new review progress — all without a reload; re-adjudicating the same criterion replaces the record instead of double-counting
criteria.reasoning: A valid adjudication increased the summary from 0 to 1, marked the row agent-bug, updated readiness/table badge, and re-adjudication behavior was supported by replacement semantics. Evidence: adjudication_rolls_up_and_badges-shared.png

criteria.name: batch_adjudication_apply
criteria.description: With flips-only active, selecting at least two flipped criteria and submitting Apply classification to selected with a valid classification and shared rationale (20–2000 characters) marks every selected row, updates summary counts by the number of newly classified criteria without double-counting replacements, and updates the trial badge in the same interaction
criteria.reasoning: Two flipped rows were selected and Apply classification to selected visibly marked both rows, raised the summary to 3, and showed the shared applied confirmation. Evidence: adjudication_rolls_up_and_badges-shared.png

criteria.name: undo_redo_adjudications
criteria.description: After recording or bulk-applying an adjudication, Undo restores the prior adjudication set, summary counts, row marks, and trial badge, and Redo reapplies the mutation; Undo and Redo controls are disabled when their stacks are empty
criteria.reasoning: Undo visibly restored 0 recorded and disabled Undo; Redo restored 1 recorded and disabled Redo, with matching toast confirmations. Evidence: adjudication_rolls_up_and_badges-shared.png

criteria.name: review_package_export_live
criteria.description: Export review package opens with Review Package JSON and Review Memo Markdown tabs regenerated live from the store; the JSON preview shows schemaVersion exactly review-package/v1, exportedAt, taskId, trialId, model, activeLabel, comparedLabels, dimensionRollup matching the rollup bar, adjudications conforming to the create field contract, summaryCounts matching the panel, and flipCriterionIds; after recording an adjudication, reopening Export includes that adjudication in both formats
criteria.reasoning: Export drawer visibly showed schemaVersion review-package/v1, live trial metadata, rollup, adjudications, summaryCounts, flipCriterionIds, and 3 adjudications after mutation. Evidence: review_package_export_live-shared.png

criteria.name: export_copy_and_download
criteria.description: Each export format tab offers Copy, which places the exact visible preview text on the clipboard with visible confirmation, and Download, which starts a real file download whose contents match that preview text
criteria.reasoning: JSON export Copy produced visible clipboard confirmation, and Download produced a real downloaded task-lantern-parse-trial-1-review.json file. Evidence: export_copy_and_download-shared.png

criteria.name: review_package_import_round_trip
criteria.description: Importing a previously exported valid Review Package JSON reconstructs the open trial's adjudications so row marks, summary counts, the trial badge, and the next Export preview match the imported adjudications array and summaryCounts
criteria.reasoning: A valid review-package/v1 JSON was imported through the visible form; the drawer closed and the app showed Imported 3 adjudications successfully with 3 recorded. Evidence: review_package_export_live-shared.png

criteria.name: command_palette_jump_and_actions
criteria.description: Ctrl+K or Cmd+K opens a command palette listing Jump to trial entries for the active task plus Export review package, Import review package, Undo, Redo, and Toggle flips-only; choosing Export opens the export drawer and Escape closes the palette without changing adjudications
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The visible command palette listed all required actions and Export opened the drawer, but Ctrl+K did not open the palette in the direct keyboard probe. Evidence: command_palette_jump_and_actions-shared.png

criteria.description: The review workspace matches the specified split-instrument composition: agent and scorer trajectory panes with a strong vertical divider, persistent side headers, and the verdict table with rollup docked below or beside them
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: At the observed viewport, trajectories are presented as one pane with an Agent/Scorer switcher; the required 1440px side-by-side composition was not observed. Evidence: split_instrument_matches_spec-shared.png

criteria.name: typography_roles_match_spec
criteria.description: Typography matches the spec: monospaced face for code, terminal, paths, criterion ids, step indices, and export JSON; UI sans elsewhere with clear title > heading > body hierarchy
criteria.reasoning: Observed sans-serif UI typography with monospaced task IDs/keyboard/export-style content and distinct title, heading, and body sizing. Evidence: split_instrument_matches_spec-shared.png

criteria.name: status_color_system_matches_spec
criteria.description: The status and verdict color system matches the spec (green yes/pass, red no/fail, amber running/in-review, accent for active/selected) with text labels or glyphs so color is never the only indicator
criteria.reasoning: Observed teal active controls, green Yes states, red No states, amber Flipped badges, and accompanying text labels/glyphs. Evidence: split_instrument_matches_spec-shared.png

criteria.name: specified_state_changes_animate
criteria.description: Transitions are applied to the state changes the spec calls out: linked-highlight easing, label-switch cross-fade and rollup animation, flips-filter row enter/exit, adjudication mark emphasis, and export drawer enter
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: The full set of specified transient animations—linked highlight, label cross-fade/rollup, filter row enter/exit, adjudication emphasis, and drawer entrance—was not directly observed end-to-end. Evidence: split_instrument_matches_spec-shared.png

criteria.reasoning: Direct hover changed the trajectory row background while its pointer remained over the row; rendered controls expose hover-wash/focus-ring behavior and eased button transitions. Evidence: hover_washes_required-shared.png

criteria.name: linked_highlight_eases_in

criteria.name: label_switch_rollup_animation

criteria.name: flips_filter_row_animation

criteria.reasoning: At 375px, document scroll width equals the viewport, tables fit their containers, and export content scrolls internally. Evidence: content_avoids_clipping_and_overflow-shared.png, export_drawer_usable_narrow-shared.png

criteria.name: chrome_adapts_to_small_screens
criteria.description: Pane switcher, bulk bar, and export/import surfaces adapt for smaller screens without disappearing off-canvas permanently
criteria.reasoning: Mobile chrome stacks controls vertically, exposes the pane switcher, and keeps import/export surfaces on-canvas. Evidence: content_avoids_clipping_and_overflow-shared.png

criteria.name: stacking_reflows_logically
criteria.description: When panes collapse below 1024px, agent/judge switching and the verdict table reflow logically without covering each other
criteria.reasoning: At 1024px the panes collapse into one visible trajectory pane with the switcher above it, and verdict content follows without overlap. Evidence: stacking_reflows_logically-1024.png

criteria.name: selections_persist_across_pane_switch
criteria.description: At narrow widths, criterion selection and active steps persist when switching between agent and scorer panes
criteria.reasoning: After selecting INT-02, switching to Scorer and back preserved the selected trajectory steps and criterion state. Evidence: content_avoids_clipping_and_overflow-shared.png

criteria.name: small_screens_avoid_horizontal_scroll
criteria.description: At 375px width the page has no horizontal scrolling
criteria.reasoning: At 375px, document and body scroll widths were both 360px, matching the available viewport width after the scrollbar. Evidence: content_avoids_clipping_and_overflow-shared.png

criteria.name: export_drawer_usable_narrow
criteria.description: The export drawer including format tabs, Copy, and Download stays fully visible and operable at 375px
criteria.reasoning: The 375px export drawer fully shows both format tabs plus Copy and Download controls, each with usable tap-target sizes; the preview panel scrolls internally. Evidence: export_drawer_usable_narrow-shared.png

criteria.name: fixed_controls_remain_accessible
criteria.description: Pane switcher, Undo/Redo, and Export controls remain accessible at desktop and mobile widths
criteria.reasoning: Undo/Redo, pane switching, and Export remain visible and operable at desktop and mobile widths. Evidence: fixed_controls_remain_accessible-desktop.png, content_avoids_clipping_and_overflow-shared.png

criteria.name: shared_state_coherence
criteria.description: All surfaces derive from one shared state: selecting a criterion drives the scorer highlight, the agent highlight, and the detail panels from the same record; switching the active label recomputes the verdict table, rollup bar, flip flags, and export dimensionRollup together; and recording, bulk-applying, undoing, or importing an adjudication updates the criterion row marks, summary counts, the trial badge, and the next Export preview in the same interaction without a reload
criteria.reasoning: UI adjudication updated the trial badge, summary, readiness, verdict state, and export preview together; import also updated the live review state. Evidence: adjudication-shared.png, export-shared.png, import-shared.png

criteria.name: no_storage_reload_seeded
criteria.description: No browser storage is used: localStorage and sessionStorage remain empty after reviewing trials, switching labels, filtering flips, adjudicating, exporting, importing, and undoing, and a page reload returns the app to its seeded state — the 3-task list, default labels active, no adjudications recorded, and empty undo and redo stacks
criteria.reasoning: After interaction and reload, localStorage/sessionStorage were empty and the seeded 3-task landing state returned. Evidence: reload-seeded-shared.png

criteria.name: console_clean_full_exercise
criteria.description: The console is free of errors and warnings on load and stays clean after opening tasks and trials, walking both trajectories, streaming terminal output, switching labels, comparing, filtering flips, adjudicating, exporting, importing, and undoing
criteria.reasoning: Console inspection after navigation, review interactions, label switching, trajectories, export/import, and adjudication reported 0 errors and 0 warnings. Evidence: interaction-stability-shared.png

criteria.name: load_and_interaction_stability
criteria.description: The app is interactive (task rows respond to activation) within 2 seconds of a local cold load; rapidly switching labels, toggling the flips filter, arrowing through both trajectories, and reopening Export stays smooth with no hangs and no surface showing data from a previously active label or step; the verdict table and timelines remain responsive while terminal output streams
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: The reachable terminal step displayed only a terminal label and explanatory text; no streaming terminal output could be exercised. Evidence: trajectory-terminal-shared.png

criteria.name: keyboard_operability_focus
criteria.description: Every interactive control — task and trial rows, the pane switcher, timeline entries, tree rows, disclosure toggles, verdict rows, evidence links, the label switcher, comparison pickers, the flips filter, flip-row checkboxes, bulk apply, Undo, Redo, Export, Import, adjudication form fields, and the command palette — is reachable and operable with the keyboard alone with a visible focus indicator; Home and End jump each timeline to its first and last steps; the active timeline entry is programmatically marked as current; opening the adjudication form, export drawer, import surface, or command palette moves focus into that surface with focus returning to the opening control on close; overlays close on Escape
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Command palette focus moved into the dialog, but Escape did not close it or restore focus; timeline Home/End behavior was also not fully reliable. Evidence: keyboard-palette-shared.png, interaction-stability-shared.png

criteria.name: labels_errors_alt_text
criteria.description: Form fields have visible labels, each validation message names the field it belongs to and renders in association with that field, placeholder screenshot frames carry descriptive alternative text, and export copy confirmation and successful import are announced through an aria-live polite region as well as shown visually
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Visible labels, descriptive image alt text, and aria-live announcements for copy/import were observed, but validation-message association could not be fully exercised in the reachable state. Evidence: adjudication-shared.png, copy-live-shared.png, import-shared.png

criteria.name: export_and_import_share_store
criteria.description: Export preview text and a successful import both derive from the same live adjudication set as the verdict table and summary panel: a mutation visible on the rows appears in the next export, and an import updates the rows, summary counts, badge, and export together without a reload
criteria.reasoning: The export preview visibly included the recorded adjudication, and importing the package announced success while preserving the live summary and review state without reload. Evidence: export-shared.png, import-shared.png

criteria.name: verdict_review_end_to_end
criteria.description: Reviewing a verdict end to end: open a task, open a trial, select a failed criterion, follow its evidence link to the highlighted scorer inspection step, see the implicated agent step outlined, and read both step details without a reload
criteria.reasoning: Selected PRF-02 linked scorer step 8, which was highlighted while the corresponding agent step was outlined; both trajectory details were visible without reload. Evidence: verdict_review_end_to_end-linked.png

criteria.name: invalid_adjudication_inline_validation
criteria.description: Adjudication flow: submitting with classification unset or rationale under 20 characters shows inline errors naming each invalid field and records nothing
criteria.reasoning: Submitting the empty form produced inline errors naming classification and rationale, with no record created. Evidence: invalid_adjudication_inline_validation-shared.png

criteria.name: adjudicate_updates_row_summary_badge
criteria.description: Adjudicating a flip: completing the form as rubric-bug with a rationale of at least 20 characters marks the row, increases the matching summary count by one, and updates the trial badge in the task table without a reload
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The valid PRF-02 submission marked the row and badge, but the observed summary increased by two records rather than exactly one. Evidence: adjudicate_updates_row_summary_badge-shared.png

criteria.name: compare_rescores_and_flips_filter
criteria.description: Comparing rescores: switching the active label changes the verdict table and rollup, picking two labels shows per-dimension deltas, enabling flips-only leaves only flipped criteria with their flags
criteria.reasoning: Evidence rescore changed the rollup, comparison showed dimension deltas, and flips-only reduced the table to the two flipped criteria. Evidence: compare_rescores_and_flips_filter-shared.png

criteria.name: batch_then_export_flow
criteria.description: Batch then export: with flips-only on, select at least two flipped criteria, Apply classification to selected as agent-bug with a valid shared rationale, confirm selected rows are marked and summary counts move, open Export review package, and confirm Review Package JSON lists those adjudications with matching summaryCounts and the Markdown memo names the same criterion ids
criteria.reasoning: Two flipped rows were selected, batch agent-bug classification with a valid shared rationale succeeded, counts moved, and JSON/Markdown export listed the same criterion IDs and summary counts. Evidence: batch_then_export_flow-shared.png

criteria.name: mutation_to_export_flow
criteria.description: Mutation-to-export: after one valid adjudication, reopening Export shows that criterionId and classification in the JSON adjudications array and Markdown memo, with Copy and Download available on the active tab
criteria.reasoning: Export previews contained adjudication criterion IDs/classifications, with Copy and Download available on the export tabs. Evidence: mutation_to_export_flow-shared.png

criteria.name: undo_after_adjudicate_flow
criteria.description: Undo after adjudicate: record a valid adjudication, confirm the row mark and summary count, Undo once, and confirm the mark, counts, badge, and Export preview restore the prior state; Redo restores the adjudication again
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Undo restored row classifications but left summary counts inconsistent with the restored state; redo restored the batch mutation. Evidence: undo_after_adjudicate_flow-shared.png

criteria.name: export_import_round_trip_flow
criteria.description: Export then import round-trip: after adjudicating at least one criterion, importing that Review Package JSON reconstructs row marks, summary counts, badge, and the next Export preview to match the package
criteria.reasoning: Importing the exported Review Package JSON closed successfully and restored row marks, counts, badge state, and subsequent export data. Evidence: export_import_round_trip_flow-shared.png

criteria.name: walk_agent_trajectory_flow
criteria.description: Walking the agent trajectory: arrow through agent steps, confirm file tree badges track the active step, open a changed code file and copy with visible confirmation, and watch a terminal step stream progressively
criteria.reasoning: Arrow navigation changed active agent steps, file-tree badges tracked changes, a changed code file opened and Copy showed confirmation, and the terminal progressed from Streaming to Complete with checks passed. Evidence: walk_agent_trajectory_flow-shared.png

criteria.name: command_palette_export_flow
criteria.description: Command palette jump: open with Ctrl+K or Cmd+K, choose Export review package, and confirm the export drawer opens with live previews
criteria.reasoning: Ctrl+K opened the command palette; choosing Export review package opened the live JSON/Markdown export drawer. Evidence: command_palette_export_flow-shared.png

criteria.name: split_instrument_composition
criteria.description: At a 1440px viewport the review workspace composes as a split instrument: two trajectory panes with a strong vertical divider and persistent headers naming the agent and scorer sides, the verdict table and rollup bar docked below or beside them, all separated by hairline borders with subtle panel shadows
criteria.reasoning: PASS — At 1440px, two trajectory panes with named headers, a strong divider, and the rollup/verdict workspace are visibly composed in one instrument layout. Evidence: split_instrument_composition-shared.png

criteria.name: type_roles_and_hierarchy
criteria.description: A monospaced face is used for code, terminal output, file paths, criterion ids, step indices, and the export JSON preview while a UI sans is used elsewhere, and page titles are visibly larger than section headings, which are larger than body and label text, consistently across views
criteria.reasoning: PASS — UI text uses a sans face while criterion IDs, file paths, and the export JSON use IBM Plex Mono; the page title is visibly larger than section and body text. Evidence: split_instrument_composition-shared.png, export_drawer_monospace_preview-shared.png

criteria.name: verdict_status_labeling_system
criteria.description: One color system covers verdicts and statuses everywhere they appear — green for yes/pass, red for no/fail, amber for running or in-review, one accent for the active step and selected criterion — and flip flags, adjudication classifications, and change badges each render a distinct treatment that always includes its word (Flipped, agent-bug, rubric-bug, scorer-error, Added, Modified, Deleted, Truncated) so color is never the only indicator
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Yes/No, In review, Flipped, and agent-bug treatments are visible, but the full required change-badge vocabulary (Added, Modified, Deleted, Truncated) was not observed. Evidence: verdict_status_labeling_system-shared.png

criteria.name: rollup_bar_proportional
criteria.description: The dimension rollup bar renders one segment per dimension with its score, the segment fill is visually proportional to that score, and the bar restyles when the active label changes
criteria.reasoning: PASS — The rollup shows one segment per dimension with percentage labels and proportional fills; changing the active label visibly updates the rollup state. Evidence: rollup_bar_proportional-shared.png, rollup_bar_proportional-after-change.png

criteria.name: dense_register_icons_states
criteria.description: The verdict table, trial table, and both timelines use compact dense rows matching a review-console register; bulk selection, Undo/Redo/Export/Import sit in the workspace chrome; one consistent icon set is used across the chrome; and loading and empty surfaces (including the no-flips state) are deliberately designed with explanatory copy rather than blank regions
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Dense verdict tables, timeline rows, workspace controls, icons, and explanatory empty-state copy are present, but no distinct trial table or no-flips empty surface was observed. Evidence: split_instrument_composition-shared.png

criteria.name: responsive_pane_collapse
criteria.description: At widths of 1024 pixels and below the workspace collapses to one trajectory pane at a time with the pane switcher always visible, and the criterion selection and active steps persist across pane switches
criteria.reasoning: PASS — At 1024px the workspace shows one trajectory pane with an always-visible Agent/Scorer switcher; switching to Scorer and back preserved the active step state. Evidence: responsive_pane_collapse-shared.png, responsive_pane_collapse-switch.png

criteria.name: copy_conventions_specific_labels
criteria.description: Headings, buttons, and labels follow one consistent capitalization convention throughout, and action labels are specific verbs (Adjudicate criterion, Compare labels, Export review package, Import review package, Apply classification to selected) rather than generic labels where a specific one is possible
criteria.reasoning: PASS — Labels use consistent sentence-style capitalization and specific actions such as Compare labels, Adjudicate criterion, Import review package, and Export review package. Evidence: split_instrument_composition-shared.png

criteria.name: export_drawer_monospace_preview
criteria.description: The Export review package surface shows format tabs, a scrollable monospaced preview block, and Copy and Download actions, visually consistent with the review-console chrome
criteria.reasoning: PASS — The export drawer visibly provides JSON/Markdown format tabs, a scrollable monospaced preview, Copy, and Download actions. Evidence: export_drawer_monospace_preview-shared.png

criteria.name: empty_states_explain_next_step

criteria.reasoning: The no-adjudications state explains how to start adjudicating, and the flips filter explains its purpose and bulk-classification next step. Evidence: copy-success-shared.png
